title: Define rebuild engine from event log
summary: Specify deterministic rebuild of materialized transaction state from the event log, including semantic memory reconstruction.
acceptance_criteria: Spec defines replay ordering and cursor handling (last_applied_seq).
Spec defines integrity checks and mismatch handling.
Spec defines truncation policy for corrupted tail events.
Spec defines how semantic_summary and user_intent are reconstructed during replay.
Spec defines how derived handoff is regenerated from canonical state.

steps.description: Define replay ordering and last_applied_seq calculation.
Specify integrity validation and torn-state precedence rules.
Define semantic memory reconstruction rules during replay.
Document handoff regeneration from canonical state.

notes: Align with Phase 1 lifecycle invariants and semantic memory rationale.
Ensure determinism for identical event sequences.
